bugs_fixed.fix: Added isinstance(parent, QMainWindow) check before calling statusBar() in _save_env
Changed btn_prune objectName from 'btn-stop' to 'btn-danger' to match QSS style
Added Cantarell, Noto Sans, DejaVu Sans to font-family fallbacks for Linux
Removed all text-transform CSS properties (unsupported in Qt QSS) from static and template QSS
Removed all letter-spacing CSS properties (unsupported in Qt QSS) from static and template QSS
Replaced hardcoded QFont('monospace', N) with QFont('monospace') + setStyleHint(QFont.StyleHint.Monospace) for proper system monospace font resolution
Config.save() now writes to a temp file via tempfile.mkstemp then os.replace() for atomic writes
Config.load() now filters unknown keys against dataclass field names before constructing Config
CONFIG_DIR now uses os.environ.get('XDG_CONFIG_HOME', Path.home() / '.config') for XDG compliance
